visa_types.name: Tourist
visa_types.documents_required:
Please print out this Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/38xAuf6mbwQfAHYnwFDmI/dec2073cb4669767b94b83325dfe947c/tourism-checklist_new.pdf) and prepare the required documents accordingly, also prepare an additional copy
                                                                        of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection. 
It is mandatory to fill and submit the Travel Plan (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4vTfEHsnngQN7zY3bfvIXb/673262fd07ed21a8d28bd8d191ab10ad/travel_plan.pdf) for each application, inlcuding minors. Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4vTfEHsnngQN7zY3bfvIXb/673262fd07ed21a8d28bd8d191ab10ad/travel_plan.pdf) to download. Please fill in detailed plan for each day, including of other Member States. You may print multiple copies for a longer duration.
Note:
- Kindly make sure that your application contains sufficient, correct and adequate information. All information must be correct and reflect your planned trip.
- In case any document is missing on submission date, additional documents can be submitted only by applicants themselves at VFS within 5 business days.
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:   Tourist]
Please click here to check visa fee (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage/1210)
Note:  From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the visa application fee online using ApplyVisa.um.dk (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage/)
Please  Note:
- The applicable VFS service fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change.
- The service fee is inclusive VAT and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Additional Services tab.
- Please note that applicants need to pay mandatory one-way courier charges which is Euro 8 (2.800 KWD). It includes charges pertaining to the transfer of documents from Denmark Embassy, Riyadh back to Denmark Visa Application Center in Kuwait.
The service fee and additional services at The Visa Application Centre are to be paid only in Kuwaiti dinar.
visa_types.processing_time:
Provided all relevant documentation has been submitted, the processing time for a Schengen visa is 15 calendar days. See the processing time at New to Denmark (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa).
However, certain visa applications may take longer for consultation. Kindly refer to the attached the list for detailed information.
"Provided all relevant documentation is present, Applications shall be decided within 15 calendar days of the date of the receiving of an (admissible) application at the Danish embassy. That period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days e.g. if the application is submitted to the Danish immigration service. Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 days."
visa_types.forms:
Register your visa application online and book an appointment with VFS
"NEW MANDATORY ONLINE VISA APPLICATION: From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the application fee online. After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print the cover letter and payment receipt from ApplyVisa‘’.
Click here to fill in your visa application form
After completing the visa application form and paying visa fee online, you must book an appointment to submit your documents at VFS. Make sure to bring along all the required documents and hand in supporting documents at the Visa Application Centre.
Make sure you are on time for your appointment; for those showing up late there is no guarantee that the application can be submitted and applicants may need to reschedule their appointment.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel, including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If the applicant during any portion of their visit
                                                                        intends to engage in business and/or official duties, he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
Possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry. Holders of a visa are requested to present proof that they fulfil the entry conditions at the external border, as provided
                                                                        for in Article 5 of the Visa Code. 
Information Letter for applicant - English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/Ywa0RT0Xf9qyqvaDjK4Ie/a6c14d4c043417e34dfe97f999e50b87/information-letter-to-the-applicant-english-friends.pdf)
Information Letter for applicant - Danish (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/79Eesq825q7Kzou3iSgImv/15bbba6c59274a89a76d1fbea024e6bf/information-letter-to-the-applicant-danish.pdf)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel, including vacationing, cruising, sightseeing and other recreational activities. If the applicant during any portion of their visit
                                                                        intends to engage in business and/or official duties, he/she must refer to other relevant visa categories.
Possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry. Holders of a visa are requested to present proof that they fulfil the entry conditions at the external border, as provided
                                                                        for in Article 5 of the Visa Code. 
Information Letter for applicant - English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/Ywa0RT0Xf9qyqvaDjK4Ie/a6c14d4c043417e34dfe97f999e50b87/information-letter-to-the-applicant-english-friends.pdf)
Information Letter for applicant - Danish (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/79Eesq825q7Kzou3iSgImv/15bbba6c59274a89a76d1fbea024e6bf/information-letter-to-the-applicant-danish.pdf)

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Tourist]
Please click here to check visa fee (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage/1210)
Note:  From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the visa application fee online using ApplyVisa.um.dk (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage/)
Please  Note:
- The applicable VFS service fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change.
- The service fee is inclusive VAT and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Additional Services tab.
- Please note that applicants need to pay mandatory one-way courier charges which is Euro 8 (2.800 KWD). It includes charges pertaining to the transfer of documents from Denmark Embassy, Riyadh back to Denmark Visa Application Center in Kuwait.
The service fee and additional services at The Visa Application Centre are to be paid only in Kuwaiti dinar.

## Documents Required
Please print out this Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/38xAuf6mbwQfAHYnwFDmI/dec2073cb4669767b94b83325dfe947c/tourism-checklist_new.pdf) and prepare the required documents accordingly, also prepare an additional copy
                                                                        of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection. 
It is mandatory to fill and submit the Travel Plan (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4vTfEHsnngQN7zY3bfvIXb/673262fd07ed21a8d28bd8d191ab10ad/travel_plan.pdf) for each application, inlcuding minors. Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4vTfEHsnngQN7zY3bfvIXb/673262fd07ed21a8d28bd8d191ab10ad/travel_plan.pdf) to download. Please fill in detailed plan for each day, including of other Member States. You may print multiple copies for a longer duration.
Note:
- Kindly make sure that your application contains sufficient, correct and adequate information. All information must be correct and reflect your planned trip.
- In case any document is missing on submission date, additional documents can be submitted only by applicants themselves at VFS within 5 business days.
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.

## Photo Specifications
*Kindly note that a physical photograph is not required to be submitted if the applicant is submitting biometrics, including digital photo enrolment.
If applicant is not required to submit biometrics, the below photograph specifications must be followed.*
Size of photograph for visa applications
After the instalment of a new system for scanning biometrics, including photographs for visa application, it is now possible to lodge a photograph of size 35 x 45 mm. Length of the head
                                                                        should not exceed 30 to 36 mm in length from chin to top of hair.
The photograph must still be in color with bright background.
Danish Visa Application Centre has been instructed by Danish mission to inform applicants that the visa application is not acceptable if the photograph does not comply with the above
                                                                        format.
                                                                    
Applicants may therefore obtain a new photograph that meets all requirements before The Danish Visa Application Centre can receive the application.
For further information see the print on the information board at The Danish Visa Application Centre or visit website https://politi.dk/pas/krav-til-pas-og-koerekortfoto (https://politi.dk/pas/krav-til-pas-og-koerekortfoto)

## Processing Time
Provided all relevant documentation has been submitted, the processing time for a Schengen visa is 15 calendar days. See the processing time at New to Denmark (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa).
However, certain visa applications may take longer for consultation. Kindly refer to the attached the list for detailed information.
"Provided all relevant documentation is present, Applications shall be decided within 15 calendar days of the date of the receiving of an (admissible) application at the Danish embassy. That period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days e.g. if the application is submitted to the Danish immigration service. Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 days."

## Download Forms
Register your visa application online and book an appointment with VFS
"NEW MANDATORY ONLINE VISA APPLICATION: From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the application fee online. After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print the cover letter and payment receipt from ApplyVisa‘’.
Click here to fill in your visa application form
After completing the visa application form and paying visa fee online, you must book an appointment to submit your documents at VFS. Make sure to bring along all the required documents and hand in supporting documents at the Visa Application Centre.
Make sure you are on time for your appointment; for those showing up late there is no guarantee that the application can be submitted and applicants may need to reschedule their appointment.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Application is applicable in case you are travelling for visit relatives and friends. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days.
Possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry and that the holders of visa are requested to present proof that they fulfil the entry conditions at the external border,
                                                                        as provided for in Article 5 of the Visa Code. 
Information Letter for applicant - English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/Ywa0RT0Xf9qyqvaDjK4Ie/a6c14d4c043417e34dfe97f999e50b87/information-letter-to-the-applicant-english-friends.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category is applicable in case you are required to have a visa for an airport transit stop. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days
Possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry. Holders of a visa are requested to present proof that they fulfil the entry conditions at the external border, as provided
                                                                        for in Article 5 of the Visa Code. 
Information Letter for applicant - English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/Ywa0RT0Xf9qyqvaDjK4Ie/a6c14d4c043417e34dfe97f999e50b87/information-letter-to-the-applicant-english-friends.pdf)

If applicant is not required to submit biometrics, the below photograph specifications must be followed.*
Size of photograph for visa applications
After the instalment of a new system for scanning biometrics, including photographs for visa application, it is now possible to lodge a photograph of size 35 x 45 mm. Length of the head
                                                                        should not exceed 30 to 36 mm in length from chin to top of hair.
The photograph must still be in color with bright background.
Danish Visa Application Centre has been instructed by Danish mission to inform applicants that the visa application is not acceptable if the photograph does not comply with the above
                                                                        format.
                                                                    
Applicants may therefore obtain a new photograph that meets all requirements before The Danish Visa Application Centre can receive the application.
For further information see the print on the information board at The Danish Visa Application Centre or visit website https://politi.dk/pas/krav-til-pas-og-koerekortfoto (https://politi.dk/pas/krav-til-pas-og-koerekortfoto)

## Processing Time
Provided all relevant documentation has been submitted, the processing time for a Schengen visa is 15 calendar days. See the processing time at New to Denmark (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa).
However, certain visa applications may take longer for consultation. Kindly refer to the attached the list for detailed information.
"Provided all relevant documentation is present, Applications shall be decided within 15 calendar days of the date of the receiving of an (admissible) application at the Danish embassy. That period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days e.g. if the application is submitted to the Danish immigration service. Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 days."

## Download Forms
Provided all relevant documentation has been submitted, the processing time for a Schengen visa is 15 calendar days.
However, certain visa applications may take longer for consultation. Kindly refer to the attached the list (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1cHG1kVFbYVi6CQy5WQxnY/140d29d60a43ec32ca1038f89810cccc/list.pdf) for detailed information.
                                                                    
“Provided all relevant documentation is present, Applications shall be decided within 15 calendar days of the date of the receiving of an (admissible) application at the Danish embassy.
                                                                        That period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days e.g. if the application is submitted to the Danish immigration service. Exceptionally, when additional documentation
                                                                        is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 days.”

visa_types.name: Business
visa_types.documents_required:
Please print out this Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1UfhaLIR1Vm1RKnSV1ujM1/dfa8df47e188efec24c6d93e12ae987b/business-checklist_new.pdf) and prepare the required documents accordingly, also prepare an additional
                                                                        copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection. 
It is mandatory to fill and submit the Travel Plan (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4vTfEHsnngQN7zY3bfvIXb/673262fd07ed21a8d28bd8d191ab10ad/travel_plan.pdf) for each application, inlcuding minors. Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4vTfEHsnngQN7zY3bfvIXb/673262fd07ed21a8d28bd8d191ab10ad/travel_plan.pdf) to download. Please fill in detailed plan for each day, including of other Member States. You may print multiple copies for a longer duration.
Note:
- Kindly make sure that your application contains sufficient, correct and adequate information. All information must be correct and reflect your planned trip.
- In case any document is missing on submission date, additional documents can be submitted only by applicants themselves at VFS within 5 business days.
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:   Business]
Please click here to check visa fee (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage/1210)
Note:  From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the visa application fee online using ApplyVisa.um.dk (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage/)
Please  Note:
- The applicable VFS service fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change.
- The service fee is inclusive VAT and is non-refundable.
- Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost. Please see more detail from Additional Services tab.
- Please note that applicants need to pay mandatory one-way courier charges which is Euro 8 (2.800 KWD). It includes charges pertaining to the transfer of documents from Denmark Embassy, Riyadh back to Denmark Visa Application Center in Kuwait.
The service fee and additional services at The Visa Application Centre are to be paid only in Kuwaiti dinar.

That period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days e.g. if the application is submitted to the Danish immigration service. Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 days."

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category is applicable in case you are travelling for business. This visa is given for a travel period of less than 90 days.
Possession of a visa does not confer an automatic right of entry. Holders of a visa are requested to present proof that they fulfil the entry conditions at the external border, as provided
                                                                        for in Article 5 of the Visa Code. 
Information Letter for applicant - English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/Ywa0RT0Xf9qyqvaDjK4Ie/a6c14d4c043417e34dfe97f999e50b87/information-letter-to-the-applicant-english-friends.pdf)
Information Letter for applicant - Danish (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/79Eesq825q7Kzou3iSgImv/15bbba6c59274a89a76d1fbea024e6bf/information-letter-to-the-applicant-danish.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
*Kindly note that a physical photograph is not required to be submitted if the applicant is submitting biometrics, including digital photo enrolment.
If applicant is not required to submit biometrics, the below photograph specifications must be followed.*
Size of photograph for visa applications
After the instalment of a new system for scanning biometrics, including photographs for visa application, it is now possible to lodge a photograph of size 35 x 45 mm. Length of the head
                                                                        should not exceed 30 to 36 mm in length from chin to top of hair.
The photograph must still be in color with bright background.
Danish Visa Application Centre has been instructed by Danish mission to inform applicants that the visa application is not acceptable if the photograph does not comply with the above
                                                                        format.
                                                                    
Applicants may therefore obtain a new photograph that meets all requirements before The Danish Visa Application Centre can receive the application.
For further information see the print on the information board at The Danish Visa Application Centre or visit website https://politi.dk/pas/krav-til-pas-og-koerekortfoto (https://politi.dk/pas/krav-til-pas-og-koerekortfoto)

## Processing Time
Provided all relevant documentation has been submitted, the processing time for a Schengen visa is 15 calendar days. See the processing time at New to Denmark (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa).
However, certain visa applications may take longer for consultation. Kindly refer to the attached the list for detailed information.
"Provided all relevant documentation is present, Applications shall be decided within 15 calendar days of the date of the receiving of an (admissible) application at the Danish embassy. That period may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days e.g. if the application is submitted to the Danish immigration service. Exceptionally, when additional documentation is needed in specific cases, the period may be extended up to a maximum of 60 days."
